summary: Tested instance management, dashboard behavior, and sidebar refresh flows. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows verified via Playwright - no regressions found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1007 lines - exceeds 700-line threshold, consider splitting into modules
refreshInstances only auto-selects when there's exactly 1 instance; if admin has 2+ instances and creates new one, new instance won't auto-select in sidebar (by design but worth noting)

flows_verified.dashboard_with_instance: PASS - 4 stat cards visible, no 400 errors (Default Instance auto-selected)
flows_verified.dashboard_no_instance: PASS - shows 'No workspace selected' message when !selectedInstance (code verified, not triggered in admin test since Default Instance auto-selected)
flows_verified.instances_page_loads: PASS - no 'Failed to load instances' error
flows_verified.default_instance_in_list: PASS - Default Instance visible in list
flows_verified.create_instance: PASS - new instance appears in list immediately with 'Instance created' toast
flows_verified.sidebar_updates_after_create: PASS - refreshInstances called via handleRefresh, sidebar count updates
flows_verified.delete_instance: PASS - instance removed from list immediately with 'Instance deleted' toast

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_UI_SidebarCheck and TEST_UI_NewInstance during testing. TEST_Iter3_Instance and TEST_Iter3_Persist created/cleaned in backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All instance management flows are working. Backend has 13 tests in test_instances_dashboard.py and 23 tests in test_multitenant_auth.py. Dashboard correctly skips API calls when no instance selected. refreshInstances in AuthContext properly syncs sidebar after create/delete. Default Instance exists in DB. Admin login auto-selects Default Instance (only 1 instance).
